_comment: GWAS Association Test Cases - SNP-trait associations
_note: GWAS associations use accessionId (STUDYID_N format) as primary key, with SNP IDs searchable via cross-references

custom_tests.name: Check association has genomic position
custom_tests.description: Verify associations have chromosome, position, region, and context

custom_tests.name: Check association to study cross-references
custom_tests.description: Verify associations link to GWAS studies

custom_tests.name: Check gene associations
custom_tests.description: Verify associations have reported genes and mapped genes

custom_tests.name: Check EFO trait cross-references
custom_tests.description: Verify associations link to EFO ontology terms for disease traits

custom_tests.name: Check SNP ID text search
custom_tests.description: Verify associations can be searched by SNP ID (rs number)

custom_tests.name: Check statistical evidence
custom_tests.description: Verify p-values and effect sizes are stored
